Deleted User 09-Mar-18 09:32 AM
Ok @Trial Vendor applicants: Unless we get a couple extra people from SIG, this looks like our Vendor team. To begin, I will explain the basics behind the Vortex Coalition Trade Network Supply Chain: -I stock up several redistribution centers at varying distances from spawn with basic goods by pearling to and from VoCo's various dupe stashes. -A select few top-level members (not necessarily vendors, we'll call them "distributors") will have access to these redistribution centers, and will disperse goods to Verified Vendors -We will have several "Rally Points" throughout the Nether roof system for exchange of stock between distributors and vendors (note: not customers) -Vendors will sell these goods to Vortex Coalition and SIG members, and receive a percentage of the profit. The Compound is one of several planned centralized redistribution centers for VoCo to sell items for VoCoin™. We will also use some of these items to fund VoCo and SIG operations. To begin, we will be supplying all Trial Vendors with a small amount of goods to sell and see how everyone performs.
Pinned a message.

Deleted User 09-Mar-18 01:16 PM
@Trial Vendor applicants: To begin, you will each receive a limited supply of 3 VoKits and 1 Shulker of both Obsidian and Golden Apples. Your job will be to sell these items for VoCoin™ at a pre-determined price. You will receive a 15% cut of all profit made. All goods and purchases will be tracked. All merchandise must be purchased in full, no buying a single stack of Obsidian or half a shulker of Golden Apples, for instance. To receive your items, tag either me or @Adriano1804 and meet one of us at our designated "Rally Point 2" location, which is at 4541x 120y -4440z (nether). Prices: VoKits - 201 VoCoin Golden Apples - 200 VoCoin (per shulker) Obsidian - 150 VoCoin (per shulker)(edited)
Pinned a message.

Adriano1804 30-May-18 12:40 PM

Adriano1804 30-May-18 12:53 PM

iZac 30-May-18 01:51 PM
it's the Trade Network run by the Vortex Coalition
you know, that whole VoCoin thing
Adriano1804 30-May-18 01:52 PM
Oh so the VoCoin thing is the trade centre?

You're supposed to trade with money, not through money
I just confused myself
iZac 30-May-18 01:53 PM
the currency of the VCTN is VoCoin
Adriano1804 30-May-18 01:54 PM
Aaahhh

iZac 30-May-18 01:58 PM
it's just the name for the whole trade system

Rosskun 19-Jun-18 12:11 AM
@Deleted User Can I ask a few questions about the way vendors work
Deleted User 19-Jun-18 12:14 AM
yep
@Rosskun
Rosskun 19-Jun-18 12:17 AM
1) Why do vendors only get x % of the profits 2) Why is the product we sell so limited 3) who decides how much each product is 4) how do they decide
Deleted User 19-Jun-18 12:24 AM
1. Because VoCo owns the items, the vendors just distribute them. The Trade Network is one of the systems that keeps money in the VCCR. 2. Because supply chains take a while to set up, we have added new items already, there are plans for more. 3. I do. 4. We select initial values based upon data from Phase III and other adjustments made to ranking systems before launch. Among other things, we're looking at average per-player VoCoin™ earn rates on a daily basis, and we make constant adjustments to ensure that players have challenges that are compelling, rewarding, and of course attainable via activity.
Rosskun 19-Jun-18 12:25 AM
Okay
Thank you
Deleted User 19-Jun-18 12:26 AM
yep
Adriano1804 19-Jun-18 08:40 AM

Deleted User 19-Jun-18 02:31 PM

@Trial Vendor @VoCo Verified™ Vendor From now on, when listing items and prices in #deleted-channel, the standard layout should be PRICE - ITEM [COLOR] Example: 150 - VoKit™ [Magenta] 150 - VoCo Brand™ PVP Kit (VoKit™ Add-On) [Red] 150 - VoCo Brand™ Crystals [Pink] 250 - VoCo Brand™ Totems [Yellow] 150 - VoCo Brand™ Rations [Orange] 200 - VoCo Brand™ XP [Lime Green] 150 - VoCo Brand™ Golden Apples [Yellow] 150 - VoCo Brand™ Fortune Pickaxes [Blue] 200 - VChests™ [Black]

$natural
reminder-bot BOT 08-Nov-18 04:36 PM
New Natural language processing Examples:
$natural in 10 minutes send Hello World! to #general
$natural at 18:00 send The big event has started!
$natural on the 16th of july at 14:00 send Subs reset today! to #subs
$natural now send 10 minutes has passed! every 10 minutes to #timer
Keywords: send : define the message every : define an interval to : define the location to send to Usage:
$natural <time statement> send <message> [every interval statement] [to #channel/@user]
Deleted User 08-Nov-18 04:36 PM
$remind
reminder-bot BOT 08-Nov-18 04:36 PM
Usage:
$remind [channel mention or user mention] <time to or time at> <message>
Example:
$remind #general 10s Hello world
$remind 10:30 It's now 10:30
Deleted User 08-Nov-18 04:36 PM

The VoKit™ 3.0 is now ready for distribution on 2b2t https://i.imgur.com/miJgtcC.png(edited)

We will need all of our @VoCo Verified™ Vendors ready to fulfill the new orders
Stronkfish 24-Nov-18 10:00 PM
alright
Deleted User 25-Nov-18 03:09 AM
The Vortex Coalition is proud to announce the VoKit™ 3.0 - A revolutionary step forward in kit technology. The VoKit 3.0 was carefully designed over the course of a year, during that time we implemented community feedback and changes in the 2b2t meta to ensure an up-to-date kit with an emphasis on usability and functionality. The VoKit 3.0 includes a plethora of must-have items, all of which are fully enchanted for maximum practicality. A VoCo Brand™ Fortune Pick is included along with two stacks of VChests™, which gives you 512 blocks of Obsidian with 64 VChests™ to spare. A VoCo Brand™ Flint and Steel is included so you have Nether access at all times. With 5 VoCo Brand™ Totems, two sets of VoCo Brand™ God-Armor, and 16 VPearls™, you can survive almost any situation with ease. Also included are 16 VoCo™ Brand Banners, so you can spread VoCo's influence far and wide! Here's the best part, the VoKit™ 3.0 is only 100 VoCoin™, with a quick and easy delivery at or near spawn! https://i.imgur.com/miJgtcC.png

VoCoin™Bot BOT 20-Dec-18 02:40 PM
CommandInvokeError: Command raised an exception: NameError: name 'test' is not defined
Deleted User 20-Dec-18 02:41 PM
Introducing: The VoKit™ 3.0 and VoKit™ 3.1 Unbreakable Edition
The VoKit™ 3.0 is the culmination of over a year of careful research and community feedback, resulting in the most versatile kit on the market, packed with as much functionality as possible. And with the recent unbreakables exploit, we are now able to add even more useful items into the VoKit™ 3.1, thanks to the extra four armor slots. Both the VoKit™ 3.0 and 3.1 will be available on The VoCo Trade Network for 150 and 250 VoCoin™ respectively. UPCOMING SALE EVENT While we are working on stocking our VoCo Verified Vendors with the new kits for mass distribution and sale, we will be doing two limited supply sale events (with giveaways) at spawn! The location of these events will be announced shortly before they start; one VoKit™ 3.1 and three VoKit™ 3.0s will be given away at each event, no purchase necessary to be entered in the giveaway, must be present to enter/win. These limited supply sales events are currently scheduled for: Tomorrow, Friday Dec 21st at 12:00 AM Friday, Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) Next Friday, December 28th at 8:00 PM Thursday, Coordinated Universal Time (UTC)(edited)

do i have to do deliveries myself? or can i just do it normal way like i do with my shop like paying ppl to do it?
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:01 AM
however you want to do it
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:01 AM
cool
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:02 AM
also, we are currently working on changing up our Vendor system to be more functionable and efficient, so if you have any suggestions or ideas feel free to post them here
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:02 AM
i will :)
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:02 AM
I'd like to see where your hiring process and delivery system go
delivering items is the most difficult part of trade
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:03 AM
yes, i usually deliver them to a chest
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:03 AM
we don't do that because they could say it was empty and we have no way to verify it
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:03 AM
that is few thousand blocks out of spawn
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:03 AM
do you have a way to verify it or an idea how?
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:04 AM
i take a screenshot of me putting it in a chest
and I've never met someone who claimed that
delivering to a chest is usually better for both parties
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:05 AM
hm, i suppose i just worry about someone finding the chest or the buyer claiming it was taken by someone finding it
how many deliveries have you made through chests?
do you use dungeon chests?
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:06 AM
most of them were delivered by chest. around 7-8
i make it look like its a dungeon chest, i dig it down and place it down and cover it with obsidian(edited)
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:07 AM
do you place 2 to make it look like its a dungeon chest
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:08 AM
yea
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:08 AM
nice
i thought about all that but it just seemed unsecure, i suppose for the time span of a week or less its really not that likely someone would find it
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:09 AM
from my experience on 2b, I've relaised that it's not common for anyone to find stuff u hide
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:09 AM
very true
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:09 AM
unless it's on highway
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:09 AM
i was more concerned with people saying someone took it to try and get more items
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:10 AM
me and my friend made a base to test that. it is around 5-10k out
and after a year, it's still unfound and untouched
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:10 AM
continue with what you're doing, if you see no problems for a while we will probably start doing that with VCTN orders
oh yeah
i've had bases near spawn within 7k
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:12 AM
so, chests getting found isnt a problem
but as u said, ppl might claim that and scam. but that's rare
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:13 AM
so far, you said 8 orders?
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:13 AM
i never eve thought of lying to ppl i bought from and scamming them
and i don't think that would come up to many people's minds
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:14 AM
perhaps the years on 2b2t have taught me to assume the worst lol
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:14 AM
Knowing 2b someone will try it
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:14 AM
well
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:15 AM
I’d say we offer the option of dungeon chest or meet-up
If they choose dungeon chest we are responsible for the items not being there
If they didn’t get there in time
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:15 AM
ehhh that could give them ideas
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:15 AM
And if they don’t want that risk choose meet-up
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:15 AM
well so far there is a 0% rate of any risk
so we shouldn't apply that idea to customers(edited)
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:16 AM
Dungeon chests are also good for the trading because time zones don’t matter
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:16 AM
it's rlly hard to deliver person to person
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:17 AM
I usually do deliveries at the weekend with meet-ups as I can’t really meet up with someone on the west coast during the week
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:17 AM
my timezone isnt rlly good , so that's bad
its gmt+4
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:18 AM
Dungeon chests are the easiest way definitely if we decided the VCTN should use them
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:19 AM
right now i'm thinking we should
if we decide to, we will offer that ordering option with the additional items we sell soon
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:22 AM
So we’ll give the choice of meet-up or chest drop off?
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:23 AM
i don't even think we should offer a choice unless they seem concerned with the idea
and we should charge extra for meetup and delivery options
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:24 AM
yeah
that's a good idea
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 03:32 AM
Ok sounds good, with the dungeon chest delivery system I think we’ll be able to cope opening the full shop list
Because we can deliver them whenever, speeding up deliveries significantly
Deleted User 14-Jan-19 03:39 AM
Golden do you randomly pick a set of coords?
do you try to spread them out or are they kind of in the same area at times?
Golden 14-Jan-19 03:44 AM
no
spread them out(edited)
but before i do it, i ask the customer
because i wanna know what is comfortable for them
i go max to 8k overworld
and i require extra for more distances
Golden 14-Jan-19 04:57 AM
may I ask what VCTN is?
fowlup67 14-Jan-19 08:49 AM
VoCo Trade Network
Golden 14-Jan-19 09:03 AM
ooh ok
Deleted User 15-Jan-19 02:30 AM
golden if i may ask, why do you prefer dms over tagging in #deleted-channel ?
Stronkfish 15-Jan-19 02:35 AM
trade chat probs gets filled
or doesn't bother checking old pings
Deleted User 15-Jan-19 02:38 AM
you can check your mentions by pressing Ctrl + I on pc, or on mobile by swiping from the left and hitting the @ at the bottom(edited)
i just think people seeing others buy items will increase sales
Stronkfish 15-Jan-19 03:09 AM
yeah I guess so
Golden 15-Jan-19 04:16 AM
i can check the messages, but idk, its kinda annoying when orders fill up the chat

Deleted User 01-May-19 02:12 AM
is elephants new shop going to destabilize prices?
you said he undercut you hard golden
Golden 01-May-19 03:55 AM
@Deleted User could you make this channel Vendors only
Deleted User 01-May-19 03:55 AM
only exalted members were allowed but sure
Golden 01-May-19 03:56 AM
okay thank you
so, I don't think elephant shop would really affect me much
but they sure are selling some stuff for too cheap
also, they sell very basic stuff and all their kits are breakable
Deleted User 01-May-19 04:13 AM
We don't want to have a situation where he is selling too cheap to keep up with demand, that would crash prices and start a race to the bottom
Golden 01-May-19 04:48 AM
yeah, that's what I thought
Maybe you should ask them to make some prices higher?
Deleted User 01-May-19 08:07 AM
race to the bottom would be great for the market assuming they could keep up with demand
fowlup67 01-May-19 08:08 AM
For the keks I should just order like 100 of an item
Deleted User 01-May-19 08:08 AM
we’ll just have to make sure all of his transactions are legitimate and he isn’t scamming people
Golden 01-May-19 08:08 AM
I trust John.
he runs the shop with Elephant
Deleted User 01-May-19 09:25 AM
sal were you not around the last time this happened? a race to the bottom crashes economies
it is the opposite of great
prices that are too low can destabilize the market
we have an entire new rule for this in the next TOS update
fowlup67 01-May-19 09:27 AM
it is only really bad if they don't keep up with demand
because that stops all sales from happening
Deleted User 01-May-19 09:27 AM
its bad unless they keep up with demand and sell forever
if they stop selling because they can't keep up or get bored, no one will pay the original price for kits
fowlup67 01-May-19 09:28 AM
well after a long time they will
once everyone forgets their shop existed
Deleted User 01-May-19 09:28 AM
yes, it took months last time
thats bad
as long as their prices aren't ridiculously low and they can keep up with supply and demand, they are good
fowlup67 01-May-19 09:36 AM
their prices aren't that much lower than goldens
Deleted User 01-May-19 09:36 AM
then its probably good, i was basing it off of golden saying they massively undercut him
fowlup67 01-May-19 09:38 AM
they undercut his carrots and gaps by like 5 or 10 vcn but the crystals by like 35
if their totems and pearls aren't stacked then it looks ok
it they are then it is a big undercut(edited)
Golden 01-May-19 10:13 AM
i didn't say they massively overcut me @Deleted User. Beeva said that. I'm just saying some prices were lower than usual(edited)
Golden 01-May-19 10:33 AM
lol
fowlup67 01-May-19 12:38 PM
His totems are unstacked so he didn’t undercut those(edited)
Golden 01-May-19 12:38 PM
yeah
actually now I think about it
fowlup67 01-May-19 12:38 PM
Same with pearls
Golden 01-May-19 12:38 PM
it's not a huge undercut
oh, okay then, those are fair prices

Golden 01-May-19 04:23 PM
already killing my shop
devcat 01-May-19 07:44 PM
make a system where you need to pay for a permit for a shop where the price lowers with gained trust and time holding it?
devcat 01-May-19 07:58 PM
@Deleted User ?
Deleted User 01-May-19 08:22 PM

devcat 01-May-19 08:23 PM
but then the market can be regulated a bit more
Deleted User 01-May-19 08:55 PM

if that makes any sense
devcat 01-May-19 09:37 PM
oh ok
how tf do you do that though?
Deleted User 01-May-19 10:12 PM
the secret hints that we drop to people looking to sell or the support we privately give to vendors that favor the group
